Enum Class FontWeight

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<FontWeight>
net.fokinatorr.sparkle.graphics.font.FontWeight
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<FontWeight>, Constable
public enum FontWeight extends Enum<FontWeight>
A font's weight (thickness).

Note: most fonts don't support all weights; most widely supported weight values are NORMAL and BOLD.

  • Method Details

    • values

      public static FontWeight[] values()
      Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
      Returns:
      an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared

    • valueOf

      public static FontWeight valueOf(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this class. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
      Returns:
      the enum constant with the specified name
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if this enum class has no constant with the specified name
      NullPointerException - if the argument is null

    • bolder

      public FontWeight bolder()
      Returns a font weight that is bolder than this weight by one.
      Returns:
      a bolder font weight

    • lighter

      public FontWeight lighter()
      Returns a font weight that is lighter than this weight by one.
      Returns:
      a lighter font weight

    • closestOf

      public FontWeight closestOf(Collection<? extends FontWeight> weights)
      Returns the closest weight to this one from the specified collection.

      If two weights are found at the same distance from this one, the lighter one is returned.

      Parameters:
      weights - the possible candidates
      Returns:
      the closest of them to this one
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the collection is empty

    • valueOf

      public static FontWeight valueOf(int value)
      Returns a font weight with the given scalar value.
      Parameters:
      value - the weight value
      Returns:
      the respective font weight
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if no such font weight exists
